title: University of Southampton Delhi Campus Tour Details
text: Campus tour 06 July | August 2025 intake | SOLD OUT. Event Status: Completed. Date & Time: July 06, 2025 11:00 AM IST. Location: International Tech Park Gurgaon, Near Sec 59, Off, Golf Course Ext Rd, Gurugram, Haryana 122101, India. Join us for an exciting in-person event at University of Southampton Delhi where you can explore our state-of-the-art facilities and get a feel for campus life. This is your chance to experience first hand what it’s like to be a part of our vibrant community. Don’t miss out on this opportunity to discover all that the University of Southampton has to offer.
summary: This chunk details an in-person campus tour at the University of Southampton Delhi, held on July 6, 2025, in Gurugram, Haryana. The event, which offered a chance to explore facilities and campus life, is now completed and sold out.
